text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, we're walking through the shopping
district after a bit of shopping, when...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Look at that crowd over there, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's a wild wrestling match! If it is, I want in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It isn't. As we get closer...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
How about you there, with the mask? Care to try
your luck?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! I sure do! I really, really do! I don't really
know how, though!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain how the raffle works. Basically, you
spend a ticket for a chance to win a prize.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, I see! Well, it just happens that I got a
raffle ticket earlier!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: This must be what it's for!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's do it together, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We've got one chance for a tag-team attack!
What'll it be—bang or bust?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: En sus marcas, listos, fuera!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us grasp the lever together and turn
the raffle tumbler.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! A hot spring vacation coupon?! Whoa...
this is a huge win!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Wait, they said it's a trip for two, right? Does that
mean I get to go with somebody?
choice_data_list: Nice! Use it however you'd like.
Nice! Use it however you'd like.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno! Then, I'm gonna go with...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass, Grass, Grass! Grass and I are goin' on a hot
spring vacation!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wait, no, no, no! I gotta think carefully...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, on second thought, maybe I shouldn't
invite Grass...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Because I can already see it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Me, hyped as none other, splashing around and
having a ball... And Grass having none of it,
telling me to cut it out!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass always gets mad at me whenever I try to
play-wrestle in our room! Same thing when I try
have a pillow fight!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Grass and I have way different ideas of
what makes a good hot spring vacation!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass is the calm kind of girl that appreciates old
Japanese virtues.
choice_data_list: Then, what are you gonna do?
Then, what are you gonna do?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to find someone else. Someone who
doesn't get angry when I'm having fun...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Aha! Someone like you! Let's go together,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If you go with me, you can pour as much hot
spring water over your head as you like, and eat
until you're ready to burst! We can make
everything a competition!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
None of what she's saying sounds relaxing, but
what worries me the most is...
choice_data_list: Is it okay to go in the middle of the season?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's true. If I come home all bloated from
scarfing down food with you...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I won't be able to soar at the track. I'll be a rolling
condor...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's go once everything's calmed down
after the Twinkle Series and we have some time
on our hands!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yesss! All right, let's pinky promise!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm even more motivated now. From now on, I'm
workin' toward my hot spring vacation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up holding onto the hot spring vacation
coupon. With one more goal to work toward, El
Condor Pasa's morale has gone up.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, first-prize! It may not be the grand-prize,
but it's still pretty good!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's a deluxe carrot hamburger steak! Plus, if you
leave the cooking to me, you'll have no choice
but to enjoy it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna make it just the way you like it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, El Condor Pasa is going to cook it
herself.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ahem! Welcome to El Restaurante de El. And how
would you like that prepared?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: There's two you can pick from! Rare and bloody!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We also have three sauces you can pick from!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Green chili, mustard, and habanero!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's a restaurant from hell.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Right?! This'll give us plenty of stamina so we can
do our best for the rest of the year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa is quite pleased with her
nutritious prize.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, no grand-prize today! But all the same, it's
a bountiful harvest—a sea of carotene!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And if we use them well, we can do some serious
training!
choice_data_list: What are you going to do with them all?
What are you going to do with them all?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
First, I'm gonna totally line the edge of my mask
with 'em!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Then, when I run at the training track, Spe will
want some so bad she'll be chasing after me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: All right, off I go! Chao!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I... don't see that happening. But when I follow
after her...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Look at all those carrots! Wait up, El!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The scene unfolds just like El Condor Pasa
imagined. When she stops to eat, we give a carrot
to Special Week as well.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Laaame!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's... disappointing. I was hoping for
something more special...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: All right, let's wager—you and I! Winner takes all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Rock, paper, scissors! If I win, you give me the hot
spring coupon. ♪

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Y-ya know what? I think I'm gonna have to pass...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her negotiations failed, El Condor Pasa takes
home her single carrot.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! This is all I get after all my hard work?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But guess what, Trainer! These aren't just any
tissues!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
They belong to the world's strongest racer, which
makes them the world's strongest tissues! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ah, but even still, tissues are just tissues! Dang!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It just goes to show, hard work doesn't guarantee
rewards. At least we have something to blow our
noses with later.
